sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28979" key="dusepilo/gistos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσεπι-λόγιστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n28979.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to conceive</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1321.tlg001:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diog.Oen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
